decisions.title: Concerns about dashboard performance
decisions.detail: There are concerns regarding the performance of the Horizon Dashboard project.

evidence.quote: there are some concerns about performance.

decisions.title: Consideration of a better database
decisions.detail: A suggestion was made to potentially use a better database at some point for the project.

evidence.quote: Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.

decisions.title: UI aesthetic improvement required
decisions.detail: The User Interface of the dashboard needs to be improved visually.

evidence.quote: The UI needs to look nicer.

decisions.title: Current UI design is unsatisfactory
decisions.detail: The team collectively agreed that the current design of the UI is not adequate.

evidence.quote: We all agreed the current design isn't great.

decisions.title: Timelines remain undecided
decisions.detail: While timelines were discussed, no firm decisions were made regarding them.

evidence.quote: There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.

decisions.title: Potential future integration with CRM system
decisions.detail: There is a possibility that the project might need to integrate with the CRM system at some point in the future.

evidence.quote: We might need to integrate with the CRM system eventually

decisions.title: Uncertainty regarding CRM integration specifics
decisions.detail: The timing and method of potential CRM system integration are currently unknown.

evidence.quote: we're not sure when or how.

decisions.title: Budget is a concern
decisions.detail: Budget was briefly mentioned, indicating it is a point of concern for the project.

decisions.title: Lack of budget figures
decisions.detail: Specific financial figures related to the budget were not shared during the discussion.

decisions.title: Need for more thorough testing
decisions.detail: The team lead indicated that testing processes should be improved to be more thorough.

evidence.quote: The team lead hinted that testing should be more thorough.

decisions.title: Improvement needed in documentation
decisions.detail: It was suggested that documentation practices need to be enhanced moving forward.

evidence.quote: We should probably document things better going forward.

decisions.title: Further discussions required
decisions.detail: More discussions are deemed necessary for the project.

implementation_scope: Performance profiling and optimization for the Horizon Dashboard system.
UI component development and refinement to meet new aesthetic design requirements.
Enhance testing processes, potentially integrating new testing frameworks or methodologies (inferred_needs_confirmation).
Improve engineering documentation practices (e.g., code comments, architectural diagrams, API specifications) (inferred_needs_confirmation).
Future integration capabilities with a CRM system (inferred_needs_confirmation).

constraints.text: Existing Horizon Dashboard performance has concerns and requires optimization.
Project timelines are currently undefined (owned by PM).
Project budget is a concern; specific financial figures are unknown (owned by PM).

architectural_decisions.text: The current UI design is deemed unsatisfactory and requires an overhaul.
Consideration of a better database for the project (inferred_needs_confirmation).

open_technical_questions: Should the Horizon Dashboard project use a different database? If so, which one and what are the technical implications for migration and compatibility? (inferred_needs_confirmation from D002)

What are the specific API contracts, authentication mechanisms, and data flows required for the potential CRM integration (inferred_needs_confirmation from D006), and what is the technical feasibility and effort involved? (D007)

unresolved_behaviors: What are the specific aesthetic guidelines, design mockups, or style guides that define the improved UI for the Horizon Dashboard?
What are the specific performance metrics and acceptable thresholds (e.g., page load times, response times for key actions) for the Horizon Dashboard?
What are the specific requirements, timing, and integration methods for potential CRM system integration, if it proceeds?
What specific areas, types of testing (e.g., performance, security, usability), or coverage levels are required to meet the 'more thorough testing' objective for the project?

decision_history: The team confirmed that the UI aesthetic improvement is a key business requirement (D003).
It was collectively agreed that the current design of the UI is unsatisfactory, necessitating a redesign effort (D004).
dependencies: Potential future integration with CRM system: The project might need to integrate with the CRM system at some point in the future (inferred, needs confirmation on scope and timing) (D006).
risks: Performance Concerns: There are concerns regarding the performance of the Horizon Dashboard project, which could impact user experience and scalability (D001).
Budget Constraint: Budget is a confirmed concern for the project, with specific figures currently unknown, posing a risk to resource allocation and scope (D008).
Technical Debt/Performance Risk: A suggestion to use a 'better database' was made, indicating potential underlying technical issues or future scalability limits if not addressed (D002).
open_questions: What are the firm timelines and key deadlines for the project? (D005)
What is the specific scope, timing, and method for the potential future CRM system integration? (D007)
What are the specific financial figures and constraints that define the project budget? (D009)
What specific discussions are needed, who should be involved, and what are their desired outcomes/next steps? (D012)
Is a database upgrade a confirmed requirement, and what are the technical justifications and proposed timeline for implementing a 'better database'? (D002)
What constitutes 'more thorough testing' and what specific improvements are required for the testing processes? (D010)
What are the defined standards and action plan for improving documentation practices moving forward? (D011)

system_requirements: The Horizon Dashboard system SHALL achieve acceptable performance to address identified concerns (D001).
The User Interface of the Horizon Dashboard SHALL be aesthetically improved to resolve the current unsatisfactory design (D003, D004).
The system development SHALL incorporate more thorough testing processes to enhance quality (inferred — needs confirmation) (D010).
The system development SHALL adhere to enhanced documentation practices to improve maintainability (inferred — needs confirmation) (D011).
data_flows: The Horizon Dashboard system MAY, in the future, exchange data with an external CRM system (inferred — needs confirmation) (D006).
interface_contracts: A formal interface contract MAY need to be defined for data exchange between the Horizon Dashboard system and the CRM system (inferred — needs confirmation) (D006).

constraints.text: The project is subject to budgetary concerns (D008).

open_analysis_questions: What are the specific quantifiable performance targets and metrics that the Horizon Dashboard system must meet (D001)?
Is the current database definitively identified as a performance bottleneck, and if so, what are the specific technical limitations that necessitate a 'better' database solution (D002)?

What are the precise functional and non-functional requirements for the potential future integration with the CRM system, including data entities, direction of flow, frequency, trigger events, and required protocols (D006, D007)?

stakeholder.business_summary: The team discussed the Horizon Dashboard project, identifying significant concerns about its current performance and the outdated visual design of its user interface. Improving the dashboard's look and speed are key priorities to ensure it meets user expectations. Several important decisions, including project timelines and budget details, still need to be finalized.
key_impact: The dashboard's slow performance could lead to user frustration and reduced adoption, impacting its overall business value.
An outdated and visually unappealing user interface (UI) risks poor user experience, potentially leading to lower engagement and decreased efficiency.
Uncertainty around project timelines and budget could delay delivery or impact the scope of improvements.
Potential integration with our CRM system could streamline workflows, but lack of clarity on this dependency creates uncertainty for future planning.
Insufficient testing and documentation could introduce errors or increase long-term maintenance costs.
decisions_needing_alignment: Confirming the need to upgrade the project's database system for better performance and scalability.
Confirming the requirement to integrate the dashboard with our CRM system in the future.
Endorsement of a more thorough testing approach for the project.
Agreement on enhancing documentation practices for future development and maintenance.
major_unresolved_questions: What are the definitive timelines for completing the dashboard improvements, especially for performance and UI redesign?
What is the approved budget for the dashboard project, and how will it impact the scope of planned enhancements?
When and how will the dashboard integrate with our CRM system, and what specific data or functionalities will be shared?
What specific steps will be taken to address the performance concerns and ensure a robust and fast dashboard?

issues.description: The QA view is missing critical actionable sections such as 'acceptance_criteria', 'test_scenarios', and 'edge_cases'. For confirmed decisions like D001 (performance concerns), D003 (UI aesthetic improvement), and D004 (current UI design unsatisfactory), there should be at least high-level criteria or scenario examples to guide testing efforts.
issues.suggestion: Populate the 'acceptance_criteria' and 'test_scenarios' sections with specific, measurable criteria and test cases derived from the confirmed requirements and risks. For example, 'Acceptance Criteria: UI redesign meets [design system] specifications (D003, D004)' or 'Test Scenarios: Verify dashboard load time under [X] seconds for [Y] users (D001).'

review.reviewer_notes: The overall report is well-structured and mostly accurate, with claims traceable to the extracted decisions. However, the QA view is significantly underdeveloped, lacking crucial actionable items like acceptance criteria and test scenarios for confirmed requirements. This makes the QA output less useful and warrants a 'NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT' status.

evidence_quotes: there are some concerns about performance.
Someone mentioned we should probably use a better database at some point.
The UI needs to look nicer.
We all agreed the current design isn't great.
There was a discussion about timelines but nothing was firmly decided.
